summary: Outro Subscribe Cta component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的订阅 CTA 片尾组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/outro-subscribe-cta/src/OutroSubscribeCta.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `OutroSubscribeCta` and `outroSubscribeCtaDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Outro Subscribe Cta Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/outro-subscribe-cta to my project. Preserve the exported OutroSubscribeCtaProps API and register the OutroSubscribeCta composition with the default props.
